hooks.command: echo 'Context was compacted or the session restarted. Before continuing, re-read AGENTS.md from disk, especially the Prime Invariants block. Treat AGENTS.md, not this message, as authoritative.'

if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/protect-governance.py"; elif command -v py >/dev/null 2>&1; then py -3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/protect-governance.py"; else exit 0; fi
